result.stdout:
Usage: timing [-10] <process> <arguments>
    Prints the duration of a process invocation.
    Optionally repeats the command -10 times (or any other number like -42).

Usage: timing [-10] <process> <arguments>
    Prints the duration of a process invocation.
    Optionally repeats the command -10 times (or any other number like -42).
